workflow.name: Monitor AWS WAF-protected product prices with CapSolver, schedule, and webhook
workflow.description:
### How it works

1. Triggers at a regular interval or via a webhook request.
2. Solves AWS WAF challenge then makes a request to fetch the product page.
3. Extracts product data from the retrieved HTML page.
4. Compares the current and previously stored data to detect any changes.
5. Sends an alert if data has changed; else logs no change.
6. Returns results if triggered via webhook.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Configure schedule settings in 'Every 6 Hours' node.
- [ ] Set up AWS WAF credentials in 'Solve AWS WAF' nodes.
- [ ] Input target URL in 'Fetch Product Page' nodes.
- [ ] Configure webhook URL in 'Receive Monitor Request' node.

### Customization

Adjust the target site URL in 'Fetch Product Page' and related nodes to match different sites or specific pages.

workflow.name: AWS WAF Scraping — Price & Product Details — CapSolver + Schedule + Webhook

parameters.content:
## AWS WAF Scraping — Price & Product Details — CapSolver + Schedule + Webhook

### How it works

1. Triggers at a regular interval or via a webhook request.
2. Solves AWS WAF challenge then makes a request to fetch the product page.
3. Extracts product data from the retrieved HTML page.
4. Compares the current and previously stored data to detect any changes.
5. Sends an alert if data has changed; else logs no change.
6. Returns results if triggered via webhook.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Configure schedule settings in 'Every 6 Hours' node.
- [ ] Set up AWS WAF credentials in 'Solve AWS WAF' nodes.
- [ ] Input target URL in 'Fetch Product Page' nodes.
- [ ] Configure webhook URL in 'Receive Monitor Request' node.

### Customization

Adjust the target site URL in 'Fetch Product Page' and related nodes to match different sites or specific pages.

## Scheduled data scraping

Triggers scraping every 6 hours and solves AWS WAF.

## Scheduled fetch and extract

Fetches and processes product page data on schedule.

## Scheduled data comparison

Compares scraped data to previous entries and checks for changes.

## Scheduled alert or log

Generates alert or logs no change if applicable.

## Webhook triggered scraping

Handles requests from webhook to initiate scraping.

## Webhook fetch and extract

Fetches and processes product page data via webhook.

## Webhook data comparison

Compares and evaluates changes in data from webhook requests.

## Webhook alert/log and return

Sends an alert or logs and returns data via webhook.

user.name: CapSolver
user.bio: A fast and reliable captcha-solving service that helps your n8n workflows bypass reCAPTCHA, Cloudflare Turnstile, and other verification challenges. Ideal for automation, scraping, and AI agent workflows.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
